zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise Malet於1202年12月27日出生在英國薩默塞特加里 馬利特時，她的父親William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet26歲，母親Alice Basset of Headington24歲。她於1217年3月23日與Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet在英國薩默塞特加里 馬利特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1287年5月4日在英國薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福享年84歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特加里 馬利特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise Malet于1202年12月27日出生在英国薩默塞特加里 馬利特时，她的父亲William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet26岁，母亲Alice Basset of Headington24岁。她于1217年3月23日与Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet在英国薩默塞特加里 馬利特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1287年5月4日在英国薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福享年84岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特加里 馬利特。

nameMeanings.name: Malet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a diminutive of Mal ‘bad’ or from a derivative of the related Old French word maleit ‘accursed’ (see Mallet 1). Compare Malette .
French: from the Old French personal name Malet, a pet form of Malo (compare Mallet 2).

variants.name: Mal
meanings: Slovenian: nickname for a physically small man, from mal ‘small, little’.

variants.name: Malette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Alphonse, Francois, Jacques, Rejean, Serge.
French: variant or feminine form of Malet and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this, reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise Malet was born on 27 December 1202, in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England, her father, William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet, was 26 and her mother, Alice Basset of Headington, was 24. She married Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet on 23 March 1217, in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 4 May 1287, in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise Malet est née le 27 décembre 1202, à Curry Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice Basset of Headington, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet le 23 mars 1217, à Curry Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 4 mai 1287, à Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Curry Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise Malet am 27. Dezember 1202 in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet 26 und ihre Mutter Alice Basset of Headington 24. Sie hat am 23. März 1217 in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 4. Mai 1287 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England und wurde in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Malet è nata il il 27 dicembre 1202 nel Curry Mallet, Somerset, England, sua padre, William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Alice Basset of Headington, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet il 23 marzo 1217, nel Curry Mallet, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 4 maggio 1287, nel Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise Maletが1202年12月27日にイギリスソメルセトクウリー マレットで生まれた時，父William Malet Lord of Curry Malletは26歳，母Alice Basset of Headingtonは24歳であった。1217年3月23日にイギリスソメルセトクウリー マレットでBaron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Malletと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1287年5月4日にイギリスソメルセトチャールトン ムスグローブで84歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトクウリー マレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Malet(이)가 1202년 12월 27일 영국 서머세트 커리 맬렛에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Basset of Headington(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1217년 3월 23일 영국 서머세트 커리 맬렛에서 Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1287년 5월 4일 영국 서머세트 찰턴 무스그로브에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 커리 맬렛에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Malet nasceu em 27 de dezembro de 1202, em Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice Basset of Headington, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet em 23 de março de 1217, em Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 4 de maio de 1287, em Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise Malet родилась 27 декабря 1202 г. в местности курри маллет, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Basset of Headington, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet 23 марта 1217 г. в местности курри маллет, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 4 мая 1287 г. в местности чарлтон мусгров, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности курри маллет, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise Malet nació el 27 de diciembre de 1202, en Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alice Basset of Headington, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet el 23 de marzo de 1217, en Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1287, en Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
